name: Vicki's Noggin-knockin' Eggnog
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the liquors in a bowl.
2. In a food processor, beat the egg yolks until pale and lemon-colored.
3. Gradually add sugar to the yolks, beating until the sugar is dissolved and the mixture is thick.
4. Slowly pour the yolk mixture into the liquors in a fine stream, beating constantly.
5. Add milk and continue beating.
6. In a separate bowl, beat cream until stiff peaks form.
7. Beat egg whites until they are stiff; gently fold them into the whipped cream.
8. Gradually incorporate the liquor into the cream mixture until well combined.
9. Chill the eggnog thoroughly.
10. Sprinkle with grated nutmeg before serving.
Note: The cream will rise to the top. If necessary, stir it back in just before serving.
